verification.evidence: Final harness:gate passed 54 files / 663 tests, validate:data passed, beta readiness 15/15, route coverage 40/40, production build passed. Browser 390x844 smoke found longDecimals [] and overflow 0 across 7 routes; reward-picked next action opened popup with growth decision in viewport at y=622.

codeReview.evidence: Independent code-reviewer approved the full pass and delta review; architect review returned CLEAR after identifying non-blocking marker cap/docs drift, both addressed before final verification.

codeReviewer.evidence: Initial review: no findings, VERDICT: APPROVE. Delta review after marker cap removal, staff poaching formatting, timeout budgets, and docs updates: no findings, VERDICT: APPROVE.

architect.evidence: Architecture review: formatter reuse, state-derived office markers, and mobile decision focus fit boundaries; marker cap and stale boundary docs were non-blocking findings and were corrected; VERDICT: CLEAR.
